Interface ReactiveRedisClusterConnection

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, Closeable, ReactiveClusterCommands, ReactiveRedisConnection
public interface ReactiveRedisClusterConnection extends ReactiveRedisConnection, ReactiveClusterCommands
Since:
2.0
Author:
Christoph Strobl, Mark Paluch

    • ping

      Mono<String> ping(RedisClusterNode node)
      Test the connection to a specific Redis cluster node.
      Parameters:
      node - must not be null.
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping server response message - usually PONG.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when node is null.
      See Also:
      • RedisConnectionCommands.ping()
